project_name: VehicleAware – AI-Based Vehicle Fault Diagnosis System

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Card titles

mono.usage: Code snippets, Diagnosis probability scores, Technical data

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 hover:from-cyan-400 hover:to-blue-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 border-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md py-3 px-8 rounded-full transition-all duration-300
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/20 rounded-xl

cards.base: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.interactive_3d: transform transition-transform duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-cyan-500/20

inputs.chat_box: w-full bg-slate-950/50 border border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 rounded-2xl p-4 text-lg text-white placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500/20 transition-all shadow-inner
inputs.standard: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 focus:border-transparent

layout_strategies.grid_system: Use a Bento Grid layout (CSS Grid) for dashboard widgets and feature lists. Mix 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 spans.
layout_strategies.spacing: Use comfortable spacing. Minimum gap-4, standard gap-8. Section padding py-20 or py-32.
layout_strategies.alignment: Left-align text generally. Center-align Hero content for impact if needed, but prefer asymmetric splits.
layout_strategies.containers: Max-width-7xl for main content. Full-width for hero backgrounds.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients in the background (e.g., top-left blue glow, bottom-right purple glow) to avoid flat black.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'tracing beam' effects or 1px gradient borders on active cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows (glows) for primary actions. Deep black shadows for depth.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Thin strokes (1.5px) for elegance. glowing effect on active state.

motion.hover_effects: Scale up (1.02), Glow intensity increase, Border color shift.
motion.page_load: Staggered entrance for list items. Fade-in + Slide-up for hero elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is WCAG AA compliant. Use lighter grays (slate-200) on dark backgrounds, not dark gray.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible cyan or purple ring on focus.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very large heading.
Do NOT use solid pure black (#000000) backgrounds; use very dark slate/navy.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
Ensure no transparent backgrounds without blur/scrim to maintain readability.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Dark Futuristic' theme using the color palette provided.
Use 'Sora' font for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Add these to `index.css` via @import or Google Fonts link in HTML.
Create a global `GlassCard` component that encapsulates the glassmorphism styles to ensure consistency.
Build the 'Vehicle Systems' section using a CSS Grid (Bento style).
Integrate the 'Chat-style' input prominently in the Hero section.
Use Framer Motion for the floating 3D card effects.
Ensure the Dashboard uses the 'High Density Grid' strategy defined in the persona.
For the Fault Prediction Demo, use animated progress bars with the specific gradient colors (Cyan/Purple/Pink).
